"[10] [05:32:51 GMT-07:00 08 May 2026] (831) 316-8306 has entered the chat[05:32:51 GMT-07:00 08 May 2026] (831) 316-8306: A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements.The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage.At 12:32PM UTC, A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 37.0600 (N), Longitude -122.2497 (W).[05:32:51 GMT-07:00 08 May 2026] (831) 316-8306: The user's iPhone detected a VEHICLE CRASH that is LIKELY TO HAVE RESULTED IN INJURY.It is UNKNOWN how many OCCUPANTS may have been in the vehicle.This concludes the automatically-assembled data. You may now attempt to contact the user. However, messages may be delayed, and the user may not be able to respond.[05:32:51 GMT-07:00 08 May 2026] (831) 316-8306: Responders may need to search an area extending at least 10 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 16 meters. Responders may need to search 10 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user.Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA!The battery level of the user's device is 31-60%. Their phone number is +18313168306.[05:33:38 GMT-07:00 08 May 2026] Jo Rosbach has entered the chat[05:33:38 GMT-07:00 08 May 2026] Jo Rosbach: ARE YOU INVOLVED IN THE VEHICLE CRASHCall initiated: 05:32:50 GMT-07:00 08 May 2026Phone number: (831) 316-8306"
